overview: Online telehealth clinic providing personalized hormone therapies, weight management medications, and peptide treatments. Patients complete hormone testing at LabCorp or Quest Diagnostics, then receive online consultations with licensed providers to develop treatment plans, with medications delivered to home.
highlights: Hormone testing at LabCorp or Quest Diagnostics
Online video consultations with licensed providers
Medications in multiple forms: injections, creams, tablets, and troches
targetAudience: Adults age 24 and older seeking hormone optimization, weight management, or fertility treatment.
